layers.name: Interactive Visual Components
layers.description: A collection of reusable React components and Three.js elements designed for building the application's interactive user interface.

layers.name: Project Automation Settings
layers.description: Configuration files and workflow definitions for CI/CD pipelines and AI-assisted development environments.

layers.name: Environment and Utility Hooks
layers.description: A collection of custom React hooks and project-wide configuration files that manage application state and build environment settings.

layers.name: Core Logic Utilities
